description_long: This is a compact, overstuffed loveseat-style sofa upholstered in a light beige or off-white fabric. The sofa features two prominent, loose orange throw pillows placed symmetrically against the backrest, adding a pop of color and visual contrast. The armrests are wide, rounded, and heavily padded, extending slightly outward from the seat for a cozy, inviting appearance. The seat consists of a single, thick cushion, while the backrest is gently curved and padded for comfort. The sofa sits low to the ground, with its base and legs mostly obscured by the upholstery, suggesting a hidden or recessed leg design. The overall look is plush and casual, suitable for relaxed urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A plush, beige loveseat with wide, rounded armrests and two bright orange throw pillows, featuring a single thick seat cushion and a padded backrest. The sofa has a cozy, inviting appearance with a soft fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the sofa, both orange pillows, and the wide, rounded armrests.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the depth of the armrest and the thickness of the seat and back cushions, with one orange pillow visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the backrest's gentle curve and the partial visibility of the orange pillows, with some surface irregularities.
description_view_3: Left side view mirrors the right, showing the armrest's profile and the arrangement of the cushions, with one orange pillow visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large, thick seat cushion and a continuous padded backrest with two loose, square orange throw pillows placed symmetrically; all cushions appear uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, rounded, and heavily padded armrests that extend outward from the seat, matching the sofa's upholstery and height nearly level with the seat.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed design, likely positioned at the corners and possibly along the base for support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous, and gently curved padded backrest with no visible segmentation or tufting, providing a smooth and uniform appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, light beige fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or patterning.
